admin.whole_test_timer_help: After the candidate starts the test, they have this much time for the entire test. When time is up, whatever they answered is submitted even if incomplete.
candidate.timer_left_hours_minutes: You have about :hours h :minutes min left
candidate.timer_left_minutes_seconds: You have about :minutes min :seconds s left
candidate.test_timer_expired_body: The time allowed for this test has ended. Your answers have been saved and sent for review.
candidate.test_timer_expired_notificatio: Time for level :level has ended. Your answers have been saved.
candidate.answer_at_least_one: Please answer at least one question.
candidate.level_submitted_notification_b: Your level :level has been submitted and is awaiting administrator validation.
candidate.take_test_no_application_body: You do not yet have an application linked to a test.
candidate.take_test_waiting_admin_body: An administrator must validate your application before you can take the test.
candidate.take_test_level_submitted_body: Your answers have been saved and are awaiting administrator validation.
candidate.take_test_all_validated_body: Your application has been fully validated.
candidate.take_test_instructions: Answer the questions then click Submit. If a whole-test timer is enabled, it stays visible at the top of the screen.
candidate.submit_level_confirm: Submit level :level? You will not be able to change your answers for this level.
